posts.author: larslodewijckx (Lars Lodewijckx)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,
We’re hosting a webinar on September 25th on the best new features monday.com has released in the last 6 months. A few cool features include:

  • monday magic
  • monday vibe
  • A lot of new/improved monday AI features
  • Updates across all products
  • And much more…

You can register here: Live Webinar: New Features in monday.com

Date and time: September 25th, 14:00 -15:00 CEST

See you there!

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!
I’m trying out Monday Vibe — it’s an amazing tool! Still learning though.

Best regards,
